position.description: Select the location for the legend

showTitle.description: Display a title for legend symbols

labelPrecision.description: Select the number of decimal places to display for the values

defaultStyle.description: Default style in which the map is displayed

showStylePicker.description: Allow report readers to change the map style

showLabels.description: Display labels for map elements such as streets and region names.

showNavigationControls.description: Allow report readers to zoom, rotate and change the pitch of the map

zoom.description: Controls the default zoom level of the map. Lower values show a wider area; higher values zoom in closer.

centerLatitude.description: Default latitude at the center of the map

centerLongitude.description: Default longitude at the center of the map

heading.description: Default orientation of the map in degrees, where 0 is north, 90 is east, 180 is south, and 270 is west

pitch.description: Default tilt of the map in degrees between 0 and 60, where 0 is looking straight down at the map

autoZoom.description: Allow the map to automatically zoom over the data as the visual updates

autoZoomIncludesReferenceLayer.description: Include reference layer data when the map automatically zooms.

worldWrap.description: Allow the user to pan the map horizontally infinitively

showSelectionControl.description: This control lets you draw polygon areas on the map and retrieve all the data points that are within that area.

showCountryRegionBorders.description: Display country/region boundaries on the map.

showAdminDistrictBorders.description: Display the borders for the first-level administrative divisions, such as state or province boundaries, on the map.

showAdminDistrict2Borders.description: Display the borders for the second-level administrative divisions, such as county boundaries, on the map.

showBuildingFootprints.description: Display building footprints on the map.

showRoadDetails.description: Adjust the level of detail for visible roads. Turning this off will reduce the number of roads shown on the map.

autoStrokeColor.description: Makes the outline color contrast with the fill color for better accessibility

matchFillColor.description: Makes the outline color align with fill color

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

layerPosition.description: Specifies the position of the layer relative to other map layers

radiusScalingMethod.description: Scaling algorithm used to determine bubble size

maxRadius.description: Maximum bubble size when scaling the data

logScale.description: Range of input data logarithmically mapped to the minimum and maximum size

x1.description: X1 parameter of a cubic bezier curve

x2.description: X2 parameter of a cubic bezier curve

y1.description: Y1 parameter of a cubic bezier curve

y2.description: Y2 parameter of a cubic bezier curve

autoStrokeColor.description: Makes the outline color contrast with the fill color for better accessibility

blur.description: Amount of blur applied to the outline

pitchAlignment.description: How the bubble looks when the map is pitched

zoomScaleFactor.description: Amount the bubbles should scale relative to the zoom level. A zoom scale of one means no scaling. Large values will make bubbles smaller when zoomed out and larger when zoomed in

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

layerPosition.description: Specifies the position of the layer relative to other map layers

clusteringEnabled.description: Cluster nearby data points into one bubble to display their aggregate.

clusteredBubbleAutoStrokeColor.description: Makes the outline color contrast with the fill color for better accessibility

clusteredBubbleMatchFillColor.description: Makes the outline color align with fill color

matchFillColor.description: Makes the outline color align with fill color

scale.description: Scale of the public URL marker relative to its original size

minScale.description: Minimum scale public URL marker relative to its original size

maxScale.description: Maximum scale of the public URL marker relative to its original size

imageSourceType.description: Specifies the source of marker images

imageUrl.description: Accepted file formats for marker images sourced from URLs include PNG, JPEG, GIF, and SVG.

markerRotation.description: Specifies the rotation angle of markers.

rotationAlignment.description: How the bubble looks when the map is rotated

sizeByValue.description: Use data from the 'Size' field well to determine marker size.

heatMapRadius.description: The radius of each data point in the heat map

heatMapRadiusUnit.description: Use meters or pixels as units to visualize the data

mapTransparency.description: Sets the transparency of the heat map layer

heatMapIntensity.description: Set the baseline intensity level for all data points.

heatMapColorLow.description: The color used on the low end of the color gradient

heatMapColorCenter.description: The color used in the center of the color gradient

heatMapColorHigh.description: The color used on the high end of the color gradient

heatMapUseSize.description: Use data from the 'Size' field well to determine heat intensity.

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

layerPosition.description: Specifies the position of the layer relative to other map layers

scaleHeightOnZoom.description: Specifies if the height of the bars should scale relative to the zoom level

scaleThicknessOnZoom.description: Specifies if the width of the bars should scale relative to the zoom level

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

layerPosition.description: Specifies the position of the layer relative to other map layers

heightByValue.description: Use data from the 'Size' field well to determine column height.

widthByValue.description: Use data from the 'Size' field well to determine column width.

unselectedTransparency.description: Transparency of unselected data points on the map

showZeros.description: Specifies if points that have a size value of zero should be shown on the map using the minimum radius

showNegatives.description: Specifies if absolute value of negative size values should be plotted

minDataValue.description: The minimum value of the input data to scale against

maxDataValue.description: The maximum value of the input data to scale against

datasourceType.description: Specifies the type of the reference layer data source

referenceLayerUrl.description: Accepted file formats include GeoJSON, KML, WKT, and shapefiles that are uploaded within a zip file.

show.description: Show live traffic data on the map

showIncidents.description: Show traffic incidents on the map

showTrafficControl.description: Allow report readers to turn the traffic layer on or off

tileLayerUrl.description: Formatted URL to the tile layer service or TileJSON resource

tileSize.description: An integer value that specifies both the width and height dimensions of the map tiles

northBounds.description: Northern latitude of the bounding box where this tile is available

southBounds.description: Southern latitude of the bounding box where this tile is available

eastBounds.description: Eastern longitude of the bounding box where this tile is available

westBounds.description: Western longitude of the bounding box where this tile is available

isTMS.description: Use Tile Map Service (TMS) protocol, which reverses Y-axis numbering. Turn this on if your tiles appear upside-down.

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

layerPosition.description: Specifies the position of the layer relative to other map layers

tileSizeDropdown.description: An integer value that specifies both the width and height dimensions of the map tiles

minZoom.description: Minimum zoom level where layer is visible

maxZoom.description: Maximum zoom level where layer is visible

color.description: The background color for the visual

keepLayerOrder.description: Maintain layer order in reading view, even when selected

heading.description: Set the heading tag for your visual titles to help with screen reader accessibility. This won't impact the visual styling of your titles.
Set the heading tag for your visual titles to help with screen reader accessibility. This won't impact the visual styling of your titles.

background.description: The background color for the visual header

transparency.description: Set transparency for visual header background

foreground.description: The color for the visual header icons

showVisualInformationButton.description: Select to turn on visual information icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showVisualWarningButton.description: Select to turn on visual warning icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showVisualErrorButton.description: Select to turn on visual error icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showDrillRoleSelector.description: Select to turn on drill on dropdown. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showDrillUpButton.description: Select to turn on drill up icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showDrillToggleButton.description: Select to turn on drill down icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showDrillDownLevelButton.description: Select to turn on show next level icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showDrillDownExpandButton.description: Select to turn on expand to next level icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showPinButton.description: Select to turn on pin icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showFilterRestatementButton.description: Turn on the filter icon to show users a summary of the visual-level filters applied to each visual.

showFocusModeButton.description: Select to turn on focus mode icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showCopyVisualImageButton.description: Turn on the copy icon to allow people in reading view to copy visuals and paste them elsewhere

showSeeDataLayoutToggleButton.description: Select to turn on See Data layout icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showOptionsMenu.description: Select to turn on more options icon. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showCommentButton.description: Select to show comment indicator button. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showTooltipButton.description: Select to show the visual header tooltip icon

showPersonalizeVisualButton.description: Allow report readers to personalize this visual to suit their needs.

showSmartNarrativeButton.description: Select to turn on smart narrative icon.

showSetAlertButton.description: Turn on the set alert icon to allow people to create an alert on a measure in the visual. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showFollowVisualButton.description: Turn on the follow visual icon to allow people to get alerts whenever a measure changes in the visual. Changes to the visual header icon's visibility will only be applied in reading view.

showCopilotSummaryButton.description: Select to show the Copilot summary icon

section.description: Choose the page you want to use for your tooltip

text.description: Write the custom tooltip that will show up when a report page tooltip hasn't been chosen or isn't supported

transparency.description: Set transparency for the tooltip background

type.description: Choose what action will occur when this element is selected.

bookmark.description: Choose which bookmark will open when this element is selected.

drillthroughSection.description: Select a single destination or use conditional formatting for custom destination logic, such as multi-destination support.

navigationSection.description: Select a single destination or use conditional formatting for custom destination logic, such as multi-destination support.

tooltip.description: Write the custom tooltip that will show when users hover over this element.

type.description: Allows report pages to be used as tooltips for this visual

section.description: Choose the page you want to use for your tooltip

titleFontColor.description: Text color for the tooltip label

valueFontColor.description: Text color for the tooltip value

transparency.description: Set transparency for the tooltip background

actionFontColor.description: Color for drill icon and text

themedTitleFontColor.description: Text color for the tooltip label

themedValueFontColor.description: Text color for the tooltip value

showTooltipFieldsOnly.description: Include only the fields you've explicitly added to Tooltips in the Build visual pane

showSentenceFormat.description: Display tooltips using your sentence template

sentenceTemplate.description: A template string with {placeholder} tokens that are replaced with tooltip values
